notes: Added guided calendar event date and time pickers.
Added Today, Tomorrow, and quick time buttons for safer scheduling.
Calendar event save now uses picker-backed YYYY-MM-DD and HH:MM values.
Keeps previous calendar event data compatible.
No Work folder, settings, or cache behavior is changed.
No Setup wizard is shown during in-app silent updates and SA CHECK stays closed after update.
No user Work folders, settings, or cache are cleared by this update.
